title: [ImportVerilog] Support for `disable iff` in a clocked assertion
body:
In #9612, I made an oversight which meant that assertions that specify a clock but also use `disable iff` do not currently compile. I was under the impression that slang would put the `DisableIffAssertionExpr` as the outermost assertion expression, but alas, clocking declarations seem to be the outermost.

This PR detects the `ClockingAssertionExpr`, and then checks for `DisableIffAssertionExpr` inside that, removing it if found and folding the result into the `enable` parameter of `AssertOp`/`AssumeOp`.
